full_text:
We received two pieces of omentum. Both were quite stiff, suggesting a high content of tumor nodules. Anastasia cut the pieces for freezing and fixation from the small piece, so we performed drug testing experiments using dispase dissociated cells from that piece.

1st Falcon tube contained 40 mL of medium, 800 uL Dispase, and 400 uL DNAse. 2nd tube contained 30 mL of medium, 600 uL Dispase, and 300 uL DNAse. We incubated them in oven for 30 min, added 4 mL of RBC buffer. Then, cells were resuspended in 5 mL of iPDC medium, then diluted 1:10, and counted. Overall, there were 90E6 cells in 5 mL (1st tube). We only used the cells from the 1st tube, because we thought it would be enough for the experiment. 2nd tube was discarded.

2E6 cells were used for FACS. 7E6 cells were used for seeding in 48 and 384 well plates. 80E6 cells were frozen in 8 cryovials in Stem Cell Banker, with each containing 10E6 cells.

On the other hand, María took a portion of the larger piece to dissociate it with 1X collagenase & hyaluronidase in ADF+++ media. She subdivided the piece in three parts, to allow the dissociation to happen for 1 h, 2h, and 4h at 37 degrees. When the time passed, she filtered the suspensions through a 70 um mesh and did the RBC lysis with 4 mL of RBC buffer. Afterwards, cells were resuspenseded in 5 mL of ADF+++ media supplemented with 10% FBS and counted.

Then, 0.5E6 cells were plated in duplicate in cell culture-treated 6-well plates in a final total volume of 2 mL of ADF+++ media supplemented with 10% FBS.

From the1st falcon tube mentioned above for dissociation the final cell pellet was resuspended in 5ml of iPDC culture medium and further diluted 1:10 for cell counting. (This was done by Assel)

Count 1

Avg size: 12.1 uM

Count 2

Total: 1.72 E6/mL

Viablity: 69.9%

Avg size: 10.6 uM

Total cell count is 90 E6/ 5mL

From this 1.12 E6 cells (15ul /tube) were taken into 6 different 1.5mL tubes for iPDC culturing in 48 well plate and 384 well plate as described below. iPDC culture set-up and drug treatments were done by Ashwini Nagaraj.

A). Drug treatment for flow cytometry (48 well plate)

22 conditions, 6 replicates per condition = 132 wells

132 wells x 40

1000 cells/µl = 1.12 E6 * 6 tubes

6 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1000 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

Plate 40 uL per well in 48 well plate * 4 see the map below.

300 uL medium + 50 ul of diluted drugs per well same day for ATRi and ATXi combinations and next day for anti-TIGIT combinations.

B) Drug treatment for IF (384 well plate):

20 uL per well of the omentum gel mixture prepared above was plated in 384 well plate. The gel was allowed to solidify for 1hr in the cell culture incubator, followed by addition of 25 ul of culture medium per well. Followed by dispensing of the drugs using TECAN drug dispense

For ATXi and ATRi single and combination treatment for flow cytometry analysis

x on 48 well plate = 6 x 50 uL = 300 uL (prepare 600uL)

(!) c1v1 = c2v2 -> c1 x 10 uL = c2 x v2

IC50 of ATRi (Berzosertib (VE-822) is 19 nM on cell lines (https://www.selleckchem.com/products/ve-822.html)

Stock concentration of ATRi is 10mM, dilute to 0.1 mM in DMSO and use it for further dilutions indicated in this table

IC50 of ATXi Ziritaxestat (GLPG1690) is 130 nM on cell lines (https://www.medchemexpress.com/GLPG1690.html)

Stock concentration of ATXi is 1mM, dilute to 0.1 mM (for 48 well plate), and 1mM for (384 well plate) in DMSO and use it for further dilutions indicated in this table

Prepare 3 mg /mL pembrolizumab for treatment in 384 well plate

Prepare 0.75% Tween 20 in 1xPBS = 75uL tween 20 + 10 mL of 1x PBS

Dilute stock Pembrolizumab (5mg/mL) to get a final concentration of 0. 3% tween 20 = 15uL of stock pembrolizumab + 10mL of 0.75 % Tween 20.

(for 48 well plate), and 1mM for 384 well plate

TECAN Drug dispensing layout can be found at: P:\h345\afarkkilab\Projects\iPDC\Drug testing\Drug treatment reports_Tecan\2024-01-29_Drug treat_S263_pOme

48 well map for ATRi and ATXi treatment

050424

On day 3 of the drug treatment, cells from 48 well plates treated with ATRi, and ATXi combinations were harvested for flow cytometry and the samples were run on the same day.

Cells from 384 well plate were stained with live/dye and fixed with 4% PFA, and stored at +4.
